name: Eggless, Milkless, Butterless Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook together the sugar, water, raisins, drippings, and salt until combined.
2. Let the mixture cool completely.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, soda, ginger, and cinnamon.
4. Stir the dry ingredients into the cooled mixture until well combined.
5. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan and bake for 1 hour at 350°F.
To make a delicious fruit cake, add a cup of chopped dates, 1 cup mixed peel, and 1/2 cup nuts before baking. Alternatively, drop teaspoonfuls of the batter onto a cookie sheet and bake for 15 minutes.
